svg.title: Synalux POS — scheduled orders
svg.desc: Synalux POS mockup screen for scheduled orders. All UI elements admin-configurable.
svg.text: 4x Burger Combo, 2x Caesar Salad, 2x Craft Beer
Special: "Please include extra napkins and utensils"
Open Register View to add items
Add instructions for kitchen or customer...
pos_scheduled_fire_log: order_id, scheduled_at, fire_at, actual_fired_at, fired_by
Cron (5 min): WHERE fire_at <= NOW() AND status='scheduled' -> KDS INSERT + SMS
Ready SMS: when all KDS tickets bumped -> "Your order is ready for pickup"
Cancellation: Stripe refunds.create() + pos_refunds INSERT + SMS to customer
Online ordering: /pos/order?venue=X — future date/time picker enabled
House account: charge posts to account on scheduled_at date (deferred billing)
Stripe: PaymentIntent captured at order create; refund on cancel; House: deferred
Prep lead time configurable per menu item or order type (pos_prep_lead_times)
